title: Queens Chamber of Commerce New Member Orientation
address: 75-20 Astoria Blvd S Suite 140, East Elmhurst, NY 11370, USA
description: The Queens Chamber of Commerce is committed to maximizing your Membership. If you’re a new member and have yet to participate in an orientation, please register to join us in person. Over the course of orientation we’ll: Get to Know You You’ll have an opportunity to share a little about who you are, your organization, and what […]

title: 34 Ave Chess Club
description: Join us at 34 Ave & 93 St for some friendly matches. Pull up a chair, challenge a neighbor, and stay as long as there are players! All ages welcome. Challengers sought. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition and powered by Volunteers.

title: Chess Club for Kids
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join us for Chess Club! Kids are invited to a fun and engaging chess instruction session where they will learn fundamental tactics and strategy for all three facets of the game: opening, middle, and end. This program is funded by New York City Council Member Shekar Krishnan. (718) 899-2500 Get directions to event. AUDIENCE Kids(6-11)

title: Kids’ Night @ The Queensboro
address: 80-02 Northern Blvd, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Every Wednesday: Kids Eat Free at the Queensboro* Free kids’ entree with purchase of adult entree from 4-9pm

title: Visibility Brigade – Jackson Heights
description: The Visibility Brigade aka Rush Hour Resistance was founded in 2020 to provide physical messaging in the real world. We remind everyday people that they are not alone in these unprecedented times. WE PROVIDE THE MESSAGING, YOU JUST NEED TO SHOW UP WITH YOUR PASSION! Please visit https://visibilitybrigade.com for more info. Note: For safety reasons, we do […]

title: Spring Zumba with Leo
description: FREE ZUMBA this Spring at the garden! Come get down with your bad selves with Leo, our amazing Zumba instructor, every Monday and Wednesday in May and June at 6:00 PM. Yes, even on Memorial Day. @leozumbanyc is the best; he keeps you wanting more… Have some fun and get some exercise in the process.

title: Play Dungeons & Dragons @ The Queensboro
description: Visit the Queensboro restaurant for a fun Wednesday night of D&D with fellow adventurers! Your Wednesday Night, Upgraded. Looking for something better than another forgettable night out? Join us at The Queensboro for a live, in-person Dungeons & Dragons experience—played in a bar, guided by professional Dungeon Masters, and built for both first-timers and veterans. […]

title: Queens Distance Runners: Jackson Heights Community Run @ Queensboro
description: The Meetup is 6:30PM opposite The Queensboro. We wait until 6:35PM, take our Weekly Photo at the mural, then head off for our beautiful 5K route. Route: Down 34th Avenue to 69th, return and head all the way to PS 149 for 2 loops, returning all the way back on 34th ending at Travers Park […]

title: BYOB: Bring Your Own Book!
description: Come celebrate the launch of Jia Pu 家譜 cookbook with a book reading and sharing event at World’s Borough Bookshop! New York, we’re coming to you. 🏮 Do you believe in the power of food and storytelling? Are you curious about knowing the stories that shape the people around you? Join us for a BYOB: […]

title: Jackson Heights Orchestra
description: Join the JHBG and the Jackson Heights Orchestra for an historic World Premiere of a newly Commissioned work on Wednesday May 20, 2026 at 7:30pm at Trinity Lutheran Church. Led by Artistic Director Alex Wen.

title: Transoceanic Music Radio — Live Set
description: A live sonic journey exploring rhythm, migration, and cultural memory through immersive electronic mixing, where global influences converge in real time, weaving together traditions, textures, and experimental sound into a fluid, transoceanic experience. 7:30 pm to 8:30 pm (First Set) 9:30 pm to 10:30 pm (Second Set) Admission: $20 Cover charge Mezzanine Featuring: Yayo Serka […]

title: Roast Battle League NYC
description: A curated lineup of New York’s best comedians competing in vicious insult battles affiliated with Jeff Ross and Brian Moses’ Roast Battle League.
